title: Dream Stone
description: Adds the Dream Stone - an item that can make tools and equipment unbreakable in an anvil.
body:
This is a very simple mod that adds a single item - the Dream Stone.
Using it on an anvil can make equipment unbreakable.

Starting from v1.4, it uses Mixin to intercept durability consumption instead of the vanilla unbreakable tag.
You can configure which items cannot be used with the Dream Stone through the config file.

![dream](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9b8622426d8d20ceb4a2660c9b201679abad31_0.webp)
